days.text: Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. Force 2 to 3 southerly winds.
Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. Force 2 to 3 southerly winds.
Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny periods. A few thundery showers later. Force 2 to 3 north to northwesterly winds, becoming force 4 to 5 with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional Thundery showers. Force 5 to 6 west to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 4 to 5 south to southwesterly winds, occasionally force 6 with gusts.
